subject: [For Shuning & Kel Jin Review] Reg CB Townhall Agenda - 27 Feb 2026

content.answer:
Hi Shuning and Kel Jin,

Sending this email for your review and alignment regarding the topics for
our upcoming Reg CB Townhall,  once aligned, we will seek Ian’s approval
and then proceed to send out the invitation to the team.

*Details are as follows:*

   - *Date: *27 Feb 2026 (Friday)
   - *Time:* 1030am - 12nn
   - *Location*: Shopee Building - Cafe
   - *Format*: Hybrid session
   - *Duration:* 90 mins
   - *Target Audience: *~114 FTEs (across teams from SG/CN/ID/MY)
   - *Proposed agenda:*

*Key Business Updates*

   - SIP – Shuning
   - BI – Shuning
   - BPM – Shuning
   - LFF – Kel Jin
   - CNLS – Kel Jin

*2. 2026 Business Directions*

   - Same functional coverage and speakers as above

*Q&A Segment*

   - During the Q&A, there may be questions around potential offshoring in
   2026, in light of the recent SIP Commercial scope shift from SG to MY, with
   some potential qns below:


   1. There has been an increasing trend of offshoring regional functions
      from SG, what is leader's longer term view on this? do we see
most Regional
      CB functions being offshored to manage cost?
      2. Are we anticipating / planning more offshoring this year?


   - *Suggested response*

*At this time, there are no additional plans to relocate other Regional
Crossborder teams. Our immediate focus is on ensuring a smooth and
successful transition for both SG and MY teams, with handovers that has
begun and new members already onboarded.*

I will target at 10 mins, maximum 15 mins for key business update part. can
help let team leads prepare deck:
a. each team 2-3 pages is good
b. key talking points are

   -

   *bpm*: key projects in Y25 and important initiatives (highlight AI
   projects) for Y26, light touch go local projects if Xingguo team attend.
   -

   *bi*: revenue driven and cost reduction in Y25/Y26, all teams' AI OKR
   design and status
   -

   *sip*: Y25 growth review, Y26 will continue the growth with AI powered
   OPS quality control.

c. can use above sequence for team sharings.

thanks

Wang Shuning

content.question: *There has been an increasing trend of offshoring regional
*Are we anticipating / planning more offshoring this year? *

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Based on sentiments gathered from the ground, these are the
following insights:

(1) We did not have any town hall in 2025 and employees feel it would be
helpful to have a town hall to hear from our leaders and reinforce alignment

(2) Whether there are any further offshoring plans

(3) The key focus and direction for 2026

We will also gather additional questions via a Q&A Google Form and bring
them back to your attention as part of the FAQs.

Let me know if you have any further questions.

Irene
